---
title: Sensitivity of the Latitude of the Surface Westerlies to Surface Friction
pagetitle: 2007-8-1-Chen2007a - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2007
author: Gang Chen, Isaac M. Held and Walter A. Robinson
venue: Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences
venue_cit: <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 64, 2899--2915, doi:10.1175/JAS3995.1.
recommended_citation: 'Gang Chen, Isaac M. Held and Walter A. Robinson, 2007: Sensitivity
  of the Latitude of the Surface Westerlies to Surface Friction, <i>Journal of the
  Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 64, 2899--2915, doi:10.1175/JAS3995.1.'
paper_url: http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/abs/10.1175/JAS3995.1
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Sensitivity of the Latitude of the Surface Westerlies to Surface Friction

*Published in Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences, 2007*

**Recommended citation:** Gang Chen, Isaac M. Held and Walter A. Robinson, 2007: Sensitivity of the Latitude of the Surface Westerlies to Surface Friction, <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 64, 2899--2915, doi:10.1175/JAS3995.1.

[Download paper](http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/abs/10.1175/JAS3995.1){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
